issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `attributionTags` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
A newer version of `compileSdk` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0

This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi.class)`

Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 23
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `LoginStateManager` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
The resource `R.string.app_name` appears to be unused
Should explicitly set `android:icon`, there is no default
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
